node.html:
• Lead the development of Anti-Spoofing system to verify the user authentication in M-Bansos Apps.
  • Lead the development of internal verification system for multiple onboarding merchant processes, which use OCR usingTesseract on various merchant documents.
  • Lead the development of an operational dashboard, which verifies the merchant registration documents.
  • Tools: ReactJS, SpringBoot, FastApi, PostgreSQL, OracleSQL, Tesseract, Tensorflow, OpenCV, Nginx, AliCloud

• Develop, and design analytic dashboard system, for continuous monitoring of deployed chatbot models and customer input analysis.
  • Integrated pipelines for Data Preprocessing for incremental training of chatbot models.
  • Tools: ReactJS, SpringBoot, FastApi, PostgreSQL, OracleSQL, GithubActions, Kafka, Kubernetes, Nginx, AliCloud

• Develop and design chatbot on customer dashboard, based on Transformer with Entity Extraction model, using Sanic Framework for Socket & API Request
  • Deploy chatbot on cloud development environment using Docker, Nginx & Ali Cloud Kubernetes Cluster
  • Creating automatic script pipelines for Local development & Cloud deployment using Bash Scripting.
  • Tools: Tensorflow, WebSocket, Sanic, PostgreSQL, Kafka, Kubernetes, Nginx, AliCloud.
